title: Fix build_context_* and build_signature_structure in edhoc.rs
description: Update build_context_2, build_context_3, build_signature_structure helpers to align with new KDF signature from uk36.1 and Python reference. Fix any CBOR or parameter mismatches for signature structures and context for MACs. Match RFC9528 exactly.
close_reason: Implemented build_context_2, build_context_3, build_signature_structure helpers matching Python reference, RFC 9528 Sig_structure (0x85 array + tstr Signature1 + 4x bstr), and updated callsites/hardcoded context_2. Fixed CBOR parameter mismatches for MAC contexts and signatures. Cargo.lock untouched.
